facets.name: comment
facets.data: Single hero at origin. No input controller this iter — hero is static. The hero-broadcaster facet does the substrate's most important job: write the hero's (x,z) into every other Thing's facets that declare heroU/heroV. That activation lights up pickup-radius, magnet, damage-zone, status-zone, respawn-on-collect across the world without any of them needing to know about hero specifically.
